+---
+depends_on:

+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: 8f80
+title: file-demo --chat and --script modes
+---
+## What
+Per plan.md §7. Extend `Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/`:
+- `--chat`: a `LanguageModelSession` with the fused tool, availability-gated (skips gracefully without Apple Intelligence). Scripted prompts drive: read a file → edit by anchor → `diagnostics: clean`; a deliberately type-breaking edit → model sees the compiler error in the tool result → prompted to fix it. Reports op-call accuracy, rendered schema size via `tokenCount(for:)`, and retry-cap behavior on a denied path (`../../etc/passwd` → corrective → model corrects)
+- `--script`: reads op lines (JSON payloads) from stdin, executes sequentially in one process, prints typed outputs — the human-driven twin of the integration tests
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift run file-demo --script` executes a piped read→edit→read sequence against a temp dir and prints valid JSON per op
+- [ ] `swift run file-demo --chat` runs the scripted harness end-to-end on a machine with Apple Intelligence (manual, availability-gated) and skips cleanly otherwise
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/ScriptModeTests.swift`: spawn `file-demo --script` with a piped op sequence in an isolated dir; assert JSON outputs and file state
+- [ ] Run `swift test --filter ScriptModeTests` — expect: green (chat mode is manual-run but scripted; not a CI gate)
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kxq2h3g7hs70f78c7a7rqt2h
+  text: 'Research done. Design: --script logic goes in a new importable Sources/FileTool/FileToolScript.swift (FileToolScript.run(lines:context:) -> [String]): builds the fused tool via FileTool.make, parses each non-blank stdin line via GeneratedContent(json:), and dispatches through OperationTool.call(arguments:) — the same AnyOperation path the CLI driver and a LanguageModelSession use (convergence). Output is compact single-line JSON (.sortedKeys), so one op = one stdout line. Malformed JSON line -> throws ScriptModeError.malformedPayload. main.swift branches on argv (--script / --chat / default CLI) with named flag constants. --chat lives in a new file-demo target file (ChatValidationHarness), modeled on the upstream NotesTool ChatValidationHarness: availability-gated on SystemLanguageModel.default.availability (skips cleanly + clean exit off-device; FoundationModels is compile-time present on the macOS 27 SDK so build/tests never require Apple Intelligence). ScriptModeTests: in-process test driving FileToolScript.run (read->edit->read) + malformed-line test + acceptance test spawning the built file-demo --script (located via the .xctest products dir) with piped read->edit->read in an isolated temp dir, asserting JSON per op and on-disk file state. Editing a .txt never spawns sourcekit-lsp (non-diagnosable extension -> skipped), so script tests need no LSP. Adding file-demo as a dependency of FileToolIntegrationTests so swift test pre-builds the spawned binary. Starting TDD: tests first.'
